title: Tempting Toasted French Almond Tart
description: A resinous and snappy French dessert featuring ground almonds, infused oil, and a paleo-friendly twist, served in individual mini cocottes.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the ground almonds, infused oil, honey, eggs, vanilla extract, and salt until well combined.
Stir in the unsweetened almond milk until the mixture forms a smooth batter.
Pour the batter into individual mini cocottes, filling them about 3/4 of the way full.
Bake the tarts for 20 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden brown.
Remove the tarts from the oven and let them cool for 5 minutes.
Garnish each tart with sliced almonds and serve warm.
Allow the tarts to cool completely on a wire rack before storing them in an airtight container.
